nasb.text: Their nobles have sent their servants for water; They have come to the cisterns and found no water. They have returned with their vessels empty; They have been put to shame and humiliated, And they cover their heads.

esv.text: Her nobles send their servants for water; they come to the cisterns; they find no water; they return with their vessels empty; they are ashamed and confounded and cover their heads.

cnv.text: 他們的顯貴差派童僕去打水； 童僕來到池邊，卻找不到水， 就拿著空的器皿回來； 他們失望難過，蒙著自己的頭。

ccb.text: 贵族派仆人去水池打水， 仆人去那里发现没有水， 就带着空瓶垂头丧气、 羞愧难当地回去了。
